name: Lakshmi Iyer
title: Executive Chef
summary: Leads high-volume banquet kitchens with strong systems for wedding service, chef hiring, and premium traditional menus.
profileNarrative: Started on the hot line in Chettinad kitchens and now leads wedding banquet brigades handling 2,000-plus guest service, menu planning, and junior-chef training.

name: Arjun Rao
title: Sous Chef
summary: Trusted for biryani production, tandoor execution, and short-notice event staffing across hotels and high-pressure kitchens.
profileNarrative: Built his reputation through banquet-volume biryani and tandoor service for hotels, weddings, and overnight event kitchens that need fast setup and reliable output.

name: Meera Menon
title: Private Chef
summary: Designs intimate premium dining experiences with Kerala craft, pacing discipline, and guest-forward service for private hosts.
profileNarrative: Specializes in curated private dining menus, luxury home service, and Kerala tasting experiences with a strong focus on guest flow and plated finishing.

name: Zoya Khan
title: Pastry Lead
summary: Helps hotels and premium cafes launch dessert menus, pastry systems, and signature plated finishes with training support.
profileNarrative: Leads pastry R and D, cafe dessert launches, and bakery operations with a mix of production discipline and team coaching for premium outlets.

name: Raghav Singh
title: Resort Kitchen Manager
summary: Built for properties that need kitchen leadership, cost control, wedding service, and large-format guest experience.
profileNarrative: Runs resort kitchens with ownership of banquet planning, cost control, vendor coordination, and brigade discipline for high-volume guest service.

name: Neha Basu
title: Culinary Educator
summary: Pairs kitchen training with menu design and hospitality coaching for brands building polished teams and repeatable service.
profileNarrative: Works with growing brands that need training systems, modern Indian menu structure, and repeatable kitchen coaching for young teams.
